title: EB and CC on the latest - Language change
scenario: CC pop-up card incorrectly appears on Device Home Screen after language change and firmware update when CC firmware is already up to date
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Change the device language to a different language (e.g., from English to French).
4. Complete the firmware update process (if prompted).
5. Return to the Home screen of the app.
6. Observe whether the Companion Cloud (CC) pop-up card is displayed on the Device Home Screen.
expected: The CC pop-up card should NOT appear on the Device Home Screen, as the CC firmware is already up to date.
